queue.title: Confirm OpenAI credential path and identify sample gate
queue.notes: AWS Secrets Manager has existing Gold Coast GHL and Slack secrets but no OpenAI-named secret. Local secrets registry path scan found no OpenAI API key path. Code/schema work can continue; real sample/backfill/runtime execution is gated until an approved OpenAI API key is stored without printing the value.

queue.title: Finalize transcript artifact contract, Athena DDL, smoke SQL, and docs
queue.notes: Accepted after owner review. Added call_transcripts Athena DDL, smoke SQL for idempotency/lineage/status/body checks, ops doc, and JKS evidence. Verification: git diff --check and direct artifact inspection. No AWS/OpenAI/GHL calls run.

queue.title: Implement local transcription engine, OpenAI provider wrapper, idempotency, and tests
queue.notes: Completed locally. Added transcription helpers, lazy OpenAI wrapper, Janus-style fallback/transcode path, safe CLI skeleton, pyproject dependency, focused tests, and evidence. Verification: focused transcription unittest, full data-lake unittest suite, and diff hygiene. No AWS/OpenAI/GHL/Slack calls or Terraform changes run.

queue.title: Add transcription Fargate runtime, IAM, secret contract, lock, logs, and run status
queue.notes: Completed locally. Added disabled transcription ECS task definition, separate execution/task/scheduler IAM roles, OpenAI secret ARN contract, scoped S3/Glue/Athena/DynamoDB permissions, separate lock name, CloudWatch log group, run-status CLI/runtime args, docs, and evidence. No terraform apply, AWS/OpenAI/GHL/Slack calls, Docker build/push, or schedule enablement run.

queue.title: Publish curated transcript table and add smoke/acceptance checks
queue.notes: Completed locally. Added transcript-specific curated publish/write/Glue helpers, kept call_transcripts out of TABLE_ORDER to avoid hourly refresh overwrite, added focused tests including int arrow mapping/write path, acceptance SQL, docs, and evidence. No AWS/OpenAI/GHL/Slack/Athena/Docker/Terraform calls or commits.

queue.title: Run bounded real-call sample and throttled backfill after credential gate clears
queue.notes: Two one-call samples succeeded, including a 318-second call. Tej approved proceeding. Throttled backfill completed across 7 bounded runs: 261 additional calls attempted, 261 succeeded, 0 failed, 0 pending retry. gold_coast.call_transcripts now has 263 succeeded rows, and final coverage showed 263 eligible calls, 263 covered, 0 remaining.

queue.title: Enable recurring processing after approval and complete final acceptance
queue.notes: Backfill is complete. Awaiting explicit approval before enabling recurring transcription processing.

childReliability.lastIssue: Earlier slice-6 workers failed to exit cleanly, so owner completed and verified the real samples/backfill locally. Backfill is complete; driver and reporter crons remain disabled pending recurring-operation approval.

childRuns.label: jks-call-transcription-runtime-infra
childRuns.notes: Completed and owner-accepted. Added disabled transcription runtime Terraform, scoped IAM, OpenAI secret contract, lock/status CLI args, docs, and evidence. Verification covered Terraform fmt/init/validate, full unittest suite, CLI help, safe sample parser/status run, diff hygiene, and scoped leak scan.

childRuns.label: jks-call-transcription-curated-smoke
childRuns.notes: Completed locally. Added transcript-specific curated table helpers, acceptance SQL, docs, tests, and evidence. call_transcripts remains outside TABLE_ORDER, so core hourly GHL refresh will not overwrite transcript output. No external/cost-bearing commands or commits.

childRuns.label: jks-call-transcription-sample-worker
childRuns.notes: Worker did not produce observable files after the scope was narrowed to one-call sample execution. It was closed and replaced by a narrower worker.

childRuns.label: jks-call-transcription-one-call-sample-worker
childRuns.notes: Worker produced minimal one-call sample execution code, tests, docs, and evidence but did not exit cleanly; owner closed it, reviewed artifacts, ran tests, ran the real one-call sample, and accepted the implementation for the sample gate.
